questions.question: Identify the main source of noise pollution in urban areas. What are the potential impacts on human health? (5 marks)
Which pollutants contribute to acid rain, and how do they affect aquatic life? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Pollutants: sulfur dioxide, nitrogen oxides, etc.

questions.question: What are the short-term and long-term effects of air pollution on the respiratory system? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Short-term: respiratory irritation, long-term: chronic bronchitis, etc.
